name: Black Moon Necklace
short: A silver pendant said to contain the trapped aura of a fallen dancer.
full: Worn by Lelu—the owner of the Black Moon Club—this relic glows when danger nears. The chain was forged from bullets pulled from her first love.

name: New Lanta City
short: A rebuilt Atlanta pulsing with neon ambition and digital vice.
full: Known as ‘The City of Opportunity,’ New Lanta is both paradise and predator. Every block hums with stories waiting to be told.

name: Heaux Energy
short: Spiritual current born of self-love and survival.
full: A divine feminine frequency channeled through sensuality and strength—the source of every RedLight heroine’s inner power.

name: Rose Guard
short: An underground security network protecting entertainers and civilians alike.
full: Founded by Two-Tone after the Slime Wars, the Rose Guard keeps order in the chaos of nightlife.

name: Rose Code
full: A mix of loyalty, privacy, and presentation. To break the Code is to exile yourself from the circle.
